reviews.comment:
Cargue lunes a las 21:45, no sé si cambió de turno de los playeros , tardaron no me ofrecieron limpiar el vidrio, me cobra me dice que el pago no entra, iba a pagar de nuevo y me dice que el pago al final entró , nunca cargo en YPF , estaba sin nafta me quedaba cerca esta estación, seguiré en shell

(Translated by Google)
I charged on Monday at 9:45 p.m. I don't know if the beach attendants changed shifts. They took a long time and didn't offer to clean the glass. They charged me and told me that the payment didn't go in. I was going to pay again and they told me that the payment went in the end. I never charge at YPF. I was out of gas, this station was close by. I'll continue at Shell.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURucGR1RnlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hoy fui. Después de hacer la cola por quince minutos, al momento de cargar, me dice el playero que no anda la app, sólo efectivo o crédito. Deberían avisar con anticipación. Luego voy al baño. No hay jabón. Le pregunto a los playeros y la contestación fue "no sé, nosotros no limpiamos los baños, pregúntale a la señora que limpia". Voy a las oficina y me siguen atendiendo mal sin darme respuesta. Hasta que yo mismo tuve que pedir jabón a las chicas del Full. Luego por fin, aparece un señor que por fin fue amable y me explicó qué pasaba. Pero lamentablemente la atención muy muy mal. No volvería a ir jamás.

(Translated by Google)
Today I went. After waiting in line for fifteen minutes, when I was about to pay, the attendant told me the app didn't work, only cash or credit. They should have let me know in advance. Then I went to the bathroom. There was no soap. I asked the attendants, and the answer was, "I don't know, we don't clean the bathrooms; ask the lady who cleans." I went to the counter, and they continued to treat me poorly without giving me an answer. Until I had to ask the Full staff for soap myself. Then, finally, a man showed up who was kind and explained what was going on. But unfortunately, the service was very, very bad. I would never go back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuN3JUWURnEAE
